---

## Content Type

- [ ] New article / post
- [ ] Edit existing article
- [ ] New FAQ entry
- [ ] Story / case study
- [ ] Resource link
- [ ] Other

## Description

Describe the content change or addition you are requesting.

## Suggested Text / Source

Provide the suggested text or a link to the source material.

## Section / Page

Where on the website should this content appear?

## Additional Context

Any other context or references.
